title: fumana pinifolia
intro: Fumana pinifolia, also known as the strawberry tree or fumana, is a shrub or small tree with fragrant white flowers and red berries that grows in the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Fumana pinifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Fumana pinifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
